overview: Horizons Hormone Therapy provides hormone replacement therapy using bio-identical pellet therapy for men and women experiencing hormonal imbalance. Pellet insertions occur 3-4 times yearly for women or 1-2 times for men, eliminating the need for daily pills, patches, or creams.
highlights: No daily pills, patches, or creams
targetAudience: Women with moderate to severe menopausal symptoms and men with low testosterone.
